text:
There was a wise old owl in a great old tree. Every day, the owl would watch flocks of birds pass by. Once, he spotted a parrot that talked a mile a minute.

"What's your name?" asked the parrot.

"Fancybird," replied the owl.

"What a delightful name," Fancybird chuckled. "Where are you going?"

Around the bend came a troop of robins.

"Fancybird!" they squawked. "Where are you off to?"

"I'm off on an adventure."

"Oh, tell us!?"

"Well," Fancybird hooted thoughtfully, "there's a cave on the hill where I meet the moon."

The birds burst into giggles. "That sounds marvelous!"

After some time, Fancybird did indeed meet the moon.

"Hello moon."

"Hello there," replied the moon. "I've never seen a parrot before."
